application.component: { "keyToString": { "FileTemplates.SelectedTemplate": "Compose UI Screen with ViewModel.kt.child.2", "NextRunPlatformUpdateBuild": "AI-253.31033.145.2533.15176040", "NextRunPlatformUpdateSelfBuild": "AI-253.31033.145.2533.15113396", "NextRunPlatformUpdateVersion": "Panda 3 | 2025.3.3 Patch 1", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalFontSettingsService.fixStoredNonMonospacedFonts": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalOptionsProvider.migration.2025.1.1": "true", "RunOnceActivity.VFSInitializationConditionsToFusReporter": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cache.folding.model.on.disk.true": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.test.framework.showIndexingAsTask": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.test.roots.only": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.modal.commit.toggle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.reset.auto.reparse.settings.to.default": "true", "RunOnceActivity.set.chat.model.provider.canary4": "true", "SettingsSearchHistory": "liv\nfile t", "com.google.aiplugin.rag.indexer.implementation": "com.google.aiplugin.rag.bm25.CrawlerBm25Indexer/v3", "experimental.ui.used.version": "253.31033.145.2533.15113396", "fileTypeChangedCounter": "1", "fontSizeToResetConsole": "14.0", "fontSizeToResetEditor": "14.0", "installed.kotlin.plugin.version": "253.31033.145.2533.15113396-AS", "migrate.android.sdk.path.to.roamable.storage": "false", "previousColorScheme": "_@user_Dark", "registry.to.advanced.settings.migration.build": "AI-253.31033.145.2533.15113396", "studio.activity.count": "17", "studio.ml.bot.history.legacySessionRestored": "true", "terminal.gen.one.option.visible": "false" }, "keyToStringList": { "fileTypeDetectors": [ "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchFileServiceImpl$Detector", "com.jetbrains.cidr.lang.OCHeaderFileTypeDetector", "com.android.tools.idea.profilers.capture.MemoryCaptureFileType$Detector", "org.jetbrains.plugins.textmate.TextMateFileType$TextMateFileDetector" ] } }
